description_long: This is a rectangular juice carton labeled 'FARAGELLO GOLD' with a prominent image of a red apple and green leaf on the front, indicating apple juice. The carton is primarily white with gold accents and features a white plastic screw cap on the top for pouring. One side of the carton displays detailed nutritional information and ingredients in multiple languages, while another side shows the brand name vertically. The packaging is made of laminated cardboard, likely with an inner foil or plastic lining to preserve freshness. The overall design is sleek and modern, with clear branding and product information visible from multiple angles.
description: A white and gold rectangular juice carton labeled 'FARAGELLO GOLD' with a red apple image and a white screw cap. The packaging features nutritional information and branding on its sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'FARAGELLO GOLD' label, a large red apple illustration, and the white screw cap on top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the vertical 'FARAGELLO' branding and a partial view of the nutritional information panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full nutritional information panel and product details in multiple languages.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the vertical 'FARAGELLO' branding and a partial apple illustration visible.
